name: UBA : Dormant Account Use Attempted
notes: Detects the failed log in attempt from an account that has been determined to be dormant.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Dormant Accounts - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Dormant Account Use Attempted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Dormant Accounts - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Dormant Account Use Attempted
